summary: Phase 2 AI Features Testing Complete. All AI features (Insights endpoint, Natural Language Chart) are working correctly. Dashboard displays 3 widgets per row with compact layout. Cross-filtering and drill-down still work. Backend tests: 11/11 passed.

issues: Minor console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts warning on initial render, doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 AI features fully tested and working. Key features: 1) AI Insights endpoint (POST /api/ai/insights) generates statistical insights from widget data using GPT-5.2 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with fallback to basic stats. 2) Natural Language to Chart (POST /api/ai/generate-chart) converts user queries to chart configurations. 3) Dashboard uses rowHeight=32, margin=[6,6], default h=4 for compact 3-per-row widget layout. 4) AIInsightsPanel component in /app/frontend/src/components/AIInsightsPanel.jsx. 5) NaturalLanguageChart component in /app/frontend/src/components/NaturalLanguageChart.jsx. AI features use real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (not mocked).

ai_insights.fallback: Generates basic statistical insights if AI fails

mocked_apis: None - AI endpoints use real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with GPT-5.2
